theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Interviews are high-stakes, data-driven, and require absolute clarity. A strict, brutalist, high-contrast aesthetic creates a sense of authority, objectivity, and truth. The AI should feel like an elite, hyper-competent evaluator, not a playful toy.
theme_and_archetype.core_ethos: Color is function only. 95% of the UI should be monochrome. Expose the skeleton with visible grid lines. Use sharp typography and generous negative space to create visual tension.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter leading-none text-zinc-950
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-zinc-900

rules: Headings must have tight letter spacing.
Labels and overlines must be uppercase monospace with wide tracking.
Do not jump more than 2 Tailwind text sizes between a heading and its subtext.

interactive.secondary_button: bg-white hover:bg-zinc-50 text-zinc-950 border border-zinc-200 transition-colors

grid_system.general: Start mobile-first with grid-cols-1. Scale to grid-cols-12 on desktop.
grid_system.report_dashboard: Use the 'Control Room' mode: tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6), grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Utilize every pixel. Use h-full on children.
grid_system.hero_setup: Use the 'Tetris' grid: wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Create asymmetry. Example: Form takes col-span-5, image takes col-span-7.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding for containers: p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped spaces. If an element has a border, ensure internal padding prevents text collision.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, forms, and dense content. Center-align only if it intentionally improves visual tension. Optical alignment over geometrical.

cards_and_containers.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px to 4px). Avoid pill shapes.
cards_and_containers.shadows: No soft drop shadows. Use crisp 1px borders (border-zinc-200) or sharp solid shadows if brutalism is needed (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]).
cards_and_containers.glassmorphism: Avoid glassmorphism for this app. Use flat solid surfaces for data clarity.

component_customizations.buttons: Must be rectangular, sharp edges. Use pure black background for primary CTA with white text. Include group-hover translation for interior icons.
component_customizations.inputs_and_selects: Override Shadcn default radius to rounded-none. Height should be h-12 for better click targets. Border should be border-zinc-300 focus:border-zinc-950 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-950.
component_customizations.progress_bars: Used for scoring. Keep height minimal (h-2). Fill should be black (zinc-950) on a zinc-100 track. No rounded corners.
component_customizations.badges: Square corners. Use monochrome or single distinct color (blue/green/red) based on score. Font must be uppercase mono.

hero_and_setup.layout: Two-column asymmetrical split on desktop. Left: Minimalist typography and form setup. Right: Massive, high-contrast emotional image with a subtle noise overlay.
hero_and_setup.form_elements: Job Role (Text), Experience Level (Select), Duration (Select). Bold input labels.

live_voice_interview.visuals: A massive, dynamic SVG pulsing orb in the center. When AI speaks, it expands and breathes. When user speaks, an inner ring activates.
live_voice_interview.typography: Live transcript displayed at the bottom in a large, readable serif or clean sans-serif. Monospace timer at the top right.
live_voice_interview.controls: Bottom floating bar with Mute, Pause, and 'End Interview' (Signal Red border).

feedback_report.top_section: Massive overall score (text-6xl or larger) on the left, flanked by small radar chart or stat blocks on the right.
feedback_report.middle_section: Grid of key skills (Technical, Communication, Problem Solving) using progress bars and monospace scores.
feedback_report.bottom_section: Detailed question-by-question log in an expandable accordion or clean table format. Distinct sections for Strengths and Learning Suggestions.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must explicitly define hover text and background colors. Add subtle -translate-y-[1px] on cards.
motion_and_interactions.voice_pulsing: Use Framer Motion to scale (1 to 1.1) and pulse opacity (0.5 to 1) of the AI avatar/orb when audio is active.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-out for color changes.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Include prefers-reduced-motion queries. Ensure all animations convey state without relying purely on color.

icons.style: Use sharp, linear icons with stroke-width 1.5 or 2.

hero_background_1.description: Two professionals in a modern office discussing business. Bright, professional setting. Use on the right side of the Hero/Setup screen.
hero_background_1.usage: Add a bg-black/10 overlay to slightly reduce glare and let it sit comfortably in the layout.

hero_background_2.description: Asian woman interview with eyeglasses, business attire. Alternative hero image.

voice_texture.description: Abstract concentric circle pattern. Use as a highly transparent background texture (opacity-5) during the live voice interview screen.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. No pure transparent backgrounds under text. No grey-on-grey text.
